---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution

How should KRAIT handle this? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Security Considerations

Does this change affect the security model? Would it touch immutable paths, the allowlist, or KRAIT rules?

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, mockups, or references.
